title: LOUISIANA SAVINGS BANKS
doc_html:
CHAPTER 17.  LOUISIANA SAVINGS BANKS

PART I.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§1131.  Title

This Chapter shall be known as the "Louisiana Savings Bank Act of 1990".

Acts 1990, No. 816, §1, eff. Sept. 1, 1990.
